summary: Iteration 28: MercadoPago Provider Subscription - Backend 100% PASS (12/12), Frontend 100% PASS. All requested features working correctly.

issues: 404 errors in console for some resources (not affecting functionality)

backend_api_tests: Plans have correct structure (plan_id, name, price_clp, duration_months, active)
Plans have expected IDs: provider_mensual, provider_trimestral, provider_anual
Plans have correct prices: Mensual $19,990, Trimestral $49,990, Anual $149,990
POST /api/subscription/create-payment returns checkout_url for valid plan
POST /api/webhooks/mercadopago accepts POST and returns {status: ok}
Webhook handles payment notification type correctly
GET /api/subscription/my returns subscription status for authenticated user
Provider login works with proveedor1@senioradvisor.cl / demo123
frontend_ui_tests: Provider login with proveedor1@senioradvisor.cl / demo123 redirects to /provider/dashboard
SubscriptionCard displays 3 plans: Plan Mensual ($19,990), Plan Trimestral ($49,990), Plan Anual ($149,990)
Plan buttons have data-testid: plan-provider_mensual, plan-provider_trimestral, plan-provider_anual
After API response, redirects to MercadoPago checkout URL (https://www.mercadopago.cl/...)
PaymentResult page at /payment/success shows '¡Pago Exitoso!' message
PaymentResult page at /payment/failure shows 'Pago Rechazado' message

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing provider test user and seeded subscription plans
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 - MercadoPago provider subscription integration fully tested. Key findings: 1) All 3 provider plans are seeded and returned correctly via GET /api/subscription/plans?role=provider. 2) POST /api/subscription/create-payment creates MercadoPago preference and returns checkout_url starting with https://www.mercadopago.cl/. 3) MercadoPago is in PRODUCTION mode (not sandbox). 4) Webhook endpoint at POST /api/webhooks/mercadopago works correctly. 5) Provider dashboard shows SubscriptionCard with 3 plans and 'Suscribirme Ahora' button. 6) Clicking subscribe redirects to live MercadoPago checkout page. 7) PaymentResult pages (/payment/success, /payment/failure) render correctly with appropriate messages.

mocked_apis.google_maps: Disabled - SafeMap placeholder component used instead
